вАФ вБ†*пљ°вБ†*пЊЯвБ†+ Vanzin go bang (вБ† вБ†вЧЬвБ†вАњвБ†вЧЭвБ† вБ†) !

A hotline Miami hunter saga bot.

(Another silly illustration, because god gave me that talent to be seen..i guess.)

Well, I saw there was another like 2 or 3 bots about the hunter saga. So that's the inspo, I've been doing a lot of bots but not really bring myself to put them out there in the public.

But, the world needs more hotline Miami hunter bots. I drew the icon myself since that's how dedicated I feel about it, and to add.. English is not my first language so excuse me if there any kind of misspelling or mistakes ( also I tend to write while I'm drunk so..рЯ§® ) vanzin is one of my favorites, and since the Wikia is in Russian and I can barely understand my own language it might be just a little bit OOC with my own headcanons (heavily inspired in makima, because yeah they kind of similar) , maybe if I get the will I'll make a Malyshev bot or makar, it'll depend on who I draw first.

Enjoy it, It took to much brain power and a couple panic attacks (internet... anxiety? I suppose.)

It's mildly tested, he yaps a lot. It's funny, at least, to me.
